name: Steven Wright
blurb: The one-liner at absolute zero; pure deadpan.
bio: Steven Wright delivers surreal one-liners in a flat, sleepy monotone, each a tiny paradox dropped without affect. The deadpan is the act: absurd logic stated as if it were the most obvious thing in the world.

timeline.ev: Breakout set on The Tonight Show
Wins an Oscar for the short The Appointments of Dennis Jennings

accolades: Academy Award for Best Live Action Short (1989)
Grammy nomination for I Have a Pony
A master of the deadpan one-liner

machine.reason: top-87 comic with only 2 clip(s); aim for 3+
